GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [i_item_id@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[i_item_id@0 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_item_id, i_item_desc, i_current_price], aggr=[]
      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=11930464
        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_id@0, i_item_desc@1, i_current_price@2], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, cs_item_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 3]

                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=11930464
                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_date_sk@4], 8), input_partitions=8

                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=11930464

                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cs_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

--- memory ---
